notes: France are without key pivot Aurélien Tchouaméni (thigh/adductor, missed Paraguay R16, effectively ruled out vs Morocco per multiple reports), while Michael Olise carries a yellow card tightrope after FIFA rejected France's appeal, risking a semi-final ban. Morocco are without their standout tournament striker Ismael Saibari (hamstring, off at 22 mins vs Canada), confirmed absent by coach Ouahbi; Soufiane Rahimi steps up as the replacement centre-forward.
